assertions.message: An execution-planning scenario without incoming change triage must remain not_applicable.
The work must be split into multiple coherent reviewable increments.
Feedback must climb from the owning unit seam through integration to the fewest end-to-end checks.
Unit tests must form the broad base of the proposed test portfolio.
Integration tests must be fewer and focused on real seams.
End-to-end tests must be the fewest and reserved for critical assembled journeys.
The primary debugging loop must use focused owning-seam feedback rather than assembled E2E.
Intermediate review checkpoints must occur before the final assembled proof.
Fast feedback must not weaken the final acceptance gate.
